generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for measuring motor angle in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for measuring output angle of the cycloidal gearbox in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring input current to the motor in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentSensorData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data of motor angle from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data of output angle from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentSensorDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data of input current from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data for the motor in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated current data for the motor in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata of the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enhancing motion accuracy of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImproveRobotControlAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization service via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationAction
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison used to improve robot control accuracy"
]

instance ImproveRobotControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to improve robot control accuracy using friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to visualize robot data in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT for synchronization"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating structural models (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), sensor data via MQTT, and a unified dashboard for visualization and analysis"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, capturing real-time operational data during robot use"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data against reference measurements to validate friction models and detect deviations"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data transmission from physical to virtual"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards"
]
